description: A source system's booking assertion — e.g. SAP 'fertig gemeldet 100' with stock reduced and order closed (Konzept §6). Distinct from physically produced parts; the claim is itself an entity so the gap between booked and real is first-class. Inherits provenance + links from ProductionPart; quantity = claimed amount.

attributes.name: booked_system
attributes.description: System that made the booking (e.g. sap)

attributes.name: posting_doc
attributes.description: Reference to the posting document / transaction
